videos.headline: Josh Kelly gets Texas Tech on the board with a TD
videos.description: Behren Morton rips a pass to Josh Kelly for a 10-yard Texas Tech touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Josh Kelly gets Texas Tech on the board with a TD) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: North Texas' Wyatt Young breaks free for 75-yard TD
videos.description: North Texas pulls closer as Wyatt Young takes the short pass 75 yards for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (North Texas’ Wyatt Young breaks free for 75-yard TD) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tahj Brooks cruises for 21-yard Texas Tech TD
videos.description: Texas Tech goes back up 10 as Tahj Brooks goes untouched for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tahj Brooks cruises for 21-yard Texas Tech TD) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Coy Eakin goes 70 yards for the Texas Tech TD
videos.description: Behren Morton lofts one to Coy Eakin who snags it and takes it to the house for a long touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Coy Eakin goes 70 yards for the Texas Tech TD) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bralyn Lux gets the pick-six for Texas Tech
videos.description: Texas Tech's Bralyn Lux snags the interception then returns it 44 yards for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bralyn Lux gets the pick-six for Texas Tech) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas Tech turns an INT into a TD
videos.description: Texas Tech makes the most of its interception with quarterback Behren Morton scoring a 10-yard rushing touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas Tech turns an INT into a TD) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Johncarlos Miller II is wide open for 45-yard Texas Tech TD
videos.description: Texas Tech goes up 45-7 in the first half as Johncarlos Miller II scores the easy 45-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Johncarlos Miller II is wide open for 45-yard Texas Tech TD) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jalin Conyers' TD sends Texas Tech past 50 points before halftime
videos.description: Jalin Conyers finds the end zone to give Texas Tech a 52-7 lead before halftime.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jalin Conyers' TD sends Texas Tech past 50 points before halftime) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: North Texas finds the end zone in the third quarter
videos.description: North Texas' Chandler Morris slings one to Jeremiah Aaron for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (North Texas finds the end zone in the third quarter) 2024/09/14 ESHEET
